title: ticodendraceae
intro: Ticodendraceae is a plant family classification, also known as a botanical family rank. It is a grouping of plant species that share common characteristics and evolutionary relationships. Ticodendraceae is a relatively rare and unique family, consisting of only a few species found in Central and South America. This family is notable for its distinctive and often aromatic plants, which are of interest to botanists and horticulturists.
